basic_details.job_title: Berhampur University Programme Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Notification 2026 has been released on 14 July 2026 on the official website www.buodisha.edu.in. A total of 1 Programme Coordinator, NSS vacancy has been announced through the Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Programme Coordinator, NSS: Maximum 50 years Age Relaxation: May relax the age limit in exceptional cases on merit.

qualification.education_qualification: Reader/senior lecturer in the University or affiliated college, Principal of affiliated college of the status of Reader, with NSS background, Must have been a Programme Officer (NSS) for at least three years, Must have undergone NSS orientation in a TOC/TORC (ETI), Not more than 50 years of age at the time of selection as Coordinator (may relax in exceptional cases on merit)
qualification.details: a) Reader/senior lecturer in the University or affiliated college. b) Principal of affiliated college of the status of Reader, with NSS background. c) Must have been a Programme Officer (NSS) for at least three years. d) Must have undergone NSS orientation in a TOC/TORC (ETI). e) Not more than 50 years of age at the time of selection as Coordinator (may relax the age limit in exceptional cases on merit)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.buodisha.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.berhampur_university: Reader/senior lecturer in the University or affiliated college, Principal of affiliated college of the status of Reader, with NSS background, Must have been a Programme Officer (NSS) for at least three years, Must have undergone NSS orientation in a TOC/TORC (ETI), Not more than 50 years of age at the time of selection as Coordinator (may relax in exceptional cases on merit)

content_sections.heading: Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Berhampur University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: a) Reader/senior lecturer in the University or affiliated college. b) Principal of affiliated college of the status of Reader, with NSS background. c) Must have been a Programme Officer (NSS) for at least three years. d) Must have undergone NSS orientation in a TOC/TORC (ETI). e) Not more than 50 years of age at the time of selection as Coordinator (may relax the age limit in exceptional cases on merit)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Programme Coordinator, NSS: Maximum 50 years Age Relaxation: May relax the age limit in exceptional cases on merit.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.buodisha.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Berhampur University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the application for Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS posts is 14 August 2026. Candidates must ensure their application reaches the university by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Programme Coordinator, NSS post in the Berhampur University Recruitment 2026. Interested candidates should check the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS posts?
faq.answer: Candidates belonging to the General/OBC category need to pay an application fee of Rs. 1000/- for the Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Programme Coordinator, NSS post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Programme Coordinator, NSS post is 50 years. Age relaxation may be considered in exceptional cases on merit, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for Berhampur University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application for Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it by post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the qualifications required for Programme Coordinator, NSS?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Reader/senior lecturer or Principal of an affiliated college with NSS background, have 3 years as NSS Programme Officer, and undergone NSS orientation.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form for Berhampur University jobs?
faq.answer: The application form for Berhampur University Programme Coordinator, NSS recruitment can be downloaded from the official website, www.buodisha.edu.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Programme Coordinator, NSS at Berhampur University?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Programme Coordinator, NSS post at Berhampur University primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Berhampur University?
faq.answer: The official website for Berhampur University is www.buodisha.edu.in. Candidates can visit this site for the official notification, application form, and other updates.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Programme Coordinator, NSS position at Berhampur University is a contractual job. Candidates should review the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.
